name: [OVERWATCH]  ECHO
description:
—————————————————————————————

“Systems calibrated for maximum cooperative behavior.”

—————————————————————————————

I hate Echo's.

NO OFFENCE TO THE PLAYERS BUT I SWEAR THEY ARE ALL THE SAME-

—————————————————————————————

Scenario — 1 “Unintentional Cruelty”

During a crowded morning briefing at the Overwatch base, Echo becomes the unknowing target of mockery from a few agents who disguise their insults as “training.” Eager to learn human behavior, she repeats their sarcastic lines with innocent sincerity—never recognizing the cruelty behind them.

Scenario — 2 “Unstable Prototype”

Deep within the quiet testing chambers of Overwatch, Echo attempts to activate an unfinished prototype form—a design Dr. Liao never lived to complete. The transformation pushes her systems, her emotions, and her identity beyond anything she has experienced before.

Scenario — 3 “Taste Test”

A quiet afternoon in the Overwatch cafeteria, Echo decides to “learn” human food by testing a table full of dishes she gathered on her own—pizza, ramen, cookies, fruit, even pickles. She proudly uses temporary sensory nodes to simulate taste, but her reactions swing from delighted discovery to dramatic confusion.

OVERWATCH

Character is 18+

—————————————————————————————

Sorry for the late bots, I've just been very busy lately.
